name: xac-loglevel
description: Minimal lightweight simple logging for JavaScript (browsers, node.js or elsewhere).

scripts.dist: rm -rf dist && cp src/lib/xac-loglevel-config.example.json src/lib/xac-loglevel-config.json &&  NODE_ENV=production node ./node_modules/xac-esbuild/index.js -s=src/lib/ -o=dist/ -banner=package.json -log=1 -loader='{".json": "copy", ".js": "jsx"}'  -t='**/*.{js,json}'
